title: Blackbeard Speaks of Dreams
description: Mock Town shows the crew a different kind of pirate: Bellamy and his men mock dreams while Nami searches for information about Sky Island.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, this scene centers on Nami, Luffy, Zoro, Bellamy, Sarquiss. Mock Town shows the crew a different kind of pirate: Bellamy and his men mock dreams while Nami searches for information about Sky Island.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Seems like a pretty fun town,
